name: research-engine
description: Deep research engine for URLs (YouTube, arXiv, GitHub, blogs) or topic keywords. Produces structured markdown reports with full source attribution via parallel subagent fanout.

interface.shortDescription: Research URLs or topics into cited markdown reports.
interface.longDescription: Run the research-engine workflow from Codex: classify a URL or topic, gather evidence, synthesize a cited Korean markdown report, and persist artifacts under research/<date>-<slug>/.
defaultPrompt: Research this URL and write a cited report.
Research this topic with primary sources.
Follow up on the latest research session.
